reasons.glossary: All four glossary terms used (agent, MCP, Cowork, Claude Code) are linked with /glossary#... anchors on first mention.
reasons.crossRef: Three internal post links verified (sp-129 Cloudflare Dynamic Workers, sp-167 Managed Agents used twice, sp-179 skillify); ShroomDog/Clawd names don't appear in body so identity links N/A.
reasons.sourceAlign: Content faithfully tracks the Anthropic blog — three-path framing, Cloudflare 2500/1K benchmark, Elicitation Form/URL modes, CIMD, Vaults, 85%/37% numbers, Plugin+skill pattern all present.
reasons.attribution: Every blockquote attributed to Anthropic 原文 with clear speaker tags; all statistics cited (3億/月 SDK, 85% tool-def reduction, 37% multi-step, ~2500 endpoints); ClawdNote opinions clearly sandboxed from body facts.

reasons.accuracy: All numeric claims verified against source: 300M/mo SDK downloads (up from 100M), Cloudflare 2 tools / ~2,500 endpoints / ~1K tokens, 85%+ tool-definition token reduction, ~37% multi-step reduction, 200+ directory servers, Cowork data plugin 10 skills + 8 MCP servers (Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery/Hex) — every number matches the Anthropic blog.
reasons.fidelity: Direct quotes (opening 'Agents are only as useful...', create_issue_from_thread example, 'mature integrations will ship all three', 'Every integration built on MCP strengthens the ecosystem', Cloudflare reference-example quote) render accurately; the 'tends to' hedge on 85%+ is explicitly preserved as '通常能...並維持選擇準確度' and called out as a non-guaranteed observation; URL mode / form mode coverage caveat retained.
reasons.consistency: Argument structure mirrors source (three paths → production cloud thesis → server patterns → client patterns → skill×MCP → compounding conclusion); ClawdNote commentary is physically isolated in <ClawdNote> components and framed as opinion/analogy (electricity-standards, platform-play, App Store parallels), never bleeding into factual body prose.

reasons.readability: Cooking menu 跟美國電力的比喻把 MCP / M×N 解釋得超清楚，三條路結構一目了然；扣分在 Elicitation / CIMD / Vault 那段一次塞太多新名詞，OAuth 不熟的人要回頭讀一次。
reasons.firstImpression: 開頭『搬上雲第一天全部連不到』的場景直接打到我，三個硬數字（3 億下載、2500 endpoints、85%/37%）讓每個論點都有重量，結尾把 takeaway 壓成『部署地點的函數』很爽；會發給正在做 agent side project 的同事。

reasons.persona: 菜單vs流程圖 cooking analogy and 桌子堆參考書 metaphor land well; 'agent 搆不到就是廢物' harshness is peak LHY; three walls section slightly structured-explainer.
reasons.clawdNote: 5/6 notes have clear stance — platform play W3C comparison, 'agent 圈集體慚愧' 20-year snark, and practical MVP takeaway are highlights with genuine personality.
reasons.vibe: Cloudflare 2-tool section is genuinely compelling and the opening搬家 scenario hooks immediately; some information-dense passages in the walls section slightly drag momentum.
reasons.clarity: Body text maintains clean pronoun discipline throughout; subjects always named (Anthropic, agent, Cloudflare); attribution pristine with quotes properly marked.
reasons.narrative: Opening搬家 scenario callbacks in conclusion; three walls escalate tension ('一道比一道無聊、一道比一道致命'); skill extension adds forward-looking twist; some list rhythm in walls section.
